input.node_mechanism: Confounders can make two variables correlate without direct causation.
input.missing_operation: the causal step that links the before state to the after state
input.before: Name what remains after the preview.
input.after: The learner reconstructs how immune memory links safe exposure to faster response.
input.learner_text: Hot weather is the confounder: summer heat raises swimming and ice cream demand independently, so the correlation does not imply ice cream causes drowning.
